name: Iso11783OPStoreVersion
title: Iso11783OPStoreVersion
syntax: long Iso11783OPStoreVersion( dword ecuHandle, char versionName[] );
description: The function stores the current object pool on the Virtual Terminal. A Store Version command is sent to the Virtual Terminal.

parameters.name: ecuHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the ECU (must be created with Iso11783CreateECU)

parameters.name: versionName
parameters.description: Name which is used to store the object pool. For VT version smaller than 5 the name must be 7 characters long. For VT version 5 and higher a name with more than 7 characters is sent with the Store Extended Version command.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
